documents.title: Donation Eligibility Quick Reference
documents.snippet: Whole-blood donors must wait 56 days between donations. Confirm eligibility window before calling; never book an ineligible donor.

documents.title: O-negative Priority Protocol
documents.snippet: O- is the universal red-cell donor. During a shortage, prioritize eligible O- donors within 10 miles and known reliable show-ups.

documents.title: Outreach Tone Guide
documents.snippet: Reminder texts should be warm, name the drive time and location, and include a one-tap confirm. Keep under 320 characters.
